site.name: Pet Cinema
site.tagline: A solo film catalog. Watch, rate, share.

info.heading: Make it yours
info.subheading: Sign in to save films, rate what you've watched, and share with friends.

save.title: Save
save.body: Bookmark anything that catches your eye and find it later in one place.

rate.title: Rate
rate.body: Score films you've watched and shape your personal picks.

share.title: Share
share.body: Send a film link to a friend without bouncing between apps.
